description:
Displays an object defined in the global config in {{hl|CfgTitles}}.
{{Feature|arma3|For greater efficiency and ease of modability, it is recommended to use named layers with {{Link|#Syntax 3}}.}}
name: cutObj

Item.desc: the className of the object defined in {{hl|[[configFile]] >> "CfgTitles" >> class}}
Item.name: class

Item.desc: one of "PLAIN", "PLAIN DOWN", "BLACK", "BLACK FADED", "BLACK OUT", "BLACK IN", "WHITE OUT" and "WHITE IN". See [[Title Effect Type]]s for more information about these values
Item.name: type

Item.desc: time in seconds to fade in resource
Item.name: speed

Item.desc: [[false]] to hide the text when the map is opened
Item.name: showInMap

Item.desc: [[false]] to show the object under in-game HUD
Item.name: drawOverHUD

Item.desc: layer number on which the effect is shown, where 0 is the back most. Layer number is rounded to the nearest integer and also cannot be negative. Layer 99.5 will be treated as layer 100
Item.name: layer

Item.desc: the className of the object defined in {{hl|[[configFile]] >> "CfgTitles" >> class}}
Item.name: class

Item.desc: one of "PLAIN", "PLAIN DOWN", "BLACK", "BLACK FADED", "BLACK OUT", "BLACK IN", "WHITE OUT" and "WHITE IN". See [[Title Effect Type]]s for more information about these values.
Item.name: type

Item.desc: time in seconds to fade in resource
Item.name: speed

Item.desc: [[false]] to hide the text when the map is opened
Item.name: showInMap

Item.desc: [[false]] to show the object under in-game HUD
Item.name: drawOverHUD

Item.desc: layer name on which the effect is shown. Layer names are CaSe SeNsItIvE
Item.name: layerName

Item.desc: the className of the object defined in {{hl|[[configFile]] >> "CfgTitles" >> class}}
Item.name: class

Item.desc: one of "PLAIN", "PLAIN DOWN", "BLACK", "BLACK FADED", "BLACK OUT", "BLACK IN", "WHITE OUT" and "WHITE IN". See [[Title Effect Type]]s for more information about these values
Item.name: type

Item.desc: time in seconds to fade in resource
Item.name: speed

Item.desc: [[false]] to hide the text when the map is opened
Item.name: showInMap

Item.desc: [[false]] to show the object under in-game HUD
Item.name: drawOverHUD
